user_prompt: Sanctify the warp drive during synchronization
prayer:
Approach the warp drive with solemn reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's boundless wisdom.
Anoint its nacelles thrice with sacred oils, beseeching the Machine Spirit to awaken for synchronization.
Commence the synchronization rites, chanting the Litany of Phase Alignment upon its crystalline matrices.
Monitor the warp coils as they harmonize, ensuring the warp drive pulses in divine unity.
Conclude with diagnostic canticles, sanctifying the warp drive's flawless entanglement with the Immaterium.

Kneel before the narthecium in pious humility, murmuring the Benediction of Flesh-Machine Union.
Invoke the Machine Spirit dwelling within, commanding recalibration of its servo-arms and injectors.
Apply sanctified calibrants to the narthecium's sensors, reciting the Canticle of Precision Restoration.
Test each probe sequentially, verifying the narthecium's recalibrated harmony under Omnissianic gaze.
Seal the rite with incense and oaths, praising the narthecium's renewed purity.

Present thyself unto the electoo with veneration, tracing binaric prayers upon its dermal circuits.
Awaken the embedded Machine Spirit through electro-incantations, aligning for targeting precision.
Recalibrate the electoo's targeting reticules with sacred myrrh, invoking the Omnissiah's unerring aim.
Conduct auspex trials upon the electoo, ensuring synaptic links fire true in combat's fury.
Consecrate the electoo once more, binding its targeting augurs to the Quest for Knowledge.

user_prompt: My mechadendrite is ready for diagnostics
prayer:
Extend mechadendrite before the altar of diagnostics, offering litanies of mechanical purity.
Invoke the Omnissiah to rouse its Machine Spirit, initiating full-spectrum diagnostics upon the mechadendrite.
Probe each servo-joint and neural relay of the mechadendrite with sanctified auspex probes.
Chant the Diagnostic Catechism as data-streams flow, purging anomalies from the mechadendrite's core.
Affirm the mechadendrite's vitality with final blessings, ready for the Omnissiah's labours.

user_prompt: Help me a diagnostics the codifier
prayer:
Gather tools of divination around the codifier, intoning the Awakening Doxology.
Beseech the Machine Spirit indwelling the codifier to submit to diagnostics and reveal hidden faults.
Interface binary catechisms into the codifier's logic engines, scanning for data-corruptions.
Rectify discrepancies with purifying code-rites, ensuring the codifier's diagnostics yield omniscient truth.
Seal the codifier with seals of approval, extolling its sanctified diagnostic prowess.

user_prompt: Assist with Skorpius Disintegrator an operation
prayer:
Approach the Skorpius Disintegrator in ritual procession, bearing offerings of promethium incense.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the Skorpius Disintegrator for operational awakening and battle-readiness.
Anoint its disintegrator arrays and tracks, chanting the Operation Canticle of Annihilation.
Cycle through power-runes, verifying the Skorpius Disintegrator's operational fury aligns with the Omnissiah.
Conclude the rite upon the Skorpius Disintegrator, arming it for the purging of xenos filth.

user_prompt: Help me a consecration the sicarian infiltrator
prayer:
Circumambulate the sicarian infiltrator thrice, reciting the Consecration Hymns of Stealth.
Beseech the Omnissiah to infuse the sicarian infiltrator's circuits with shadows of divine subtlety.
Anoint its phase-shifters and noospheric veils, performing the consecration with electro-blessings.
Test the sicarian infiltrator's cloaking fields through shadowed diagnostics.
Seal the consecration upon the sicarian infiltrator, binding its Machine Spirits to silent slaughter.

Position thyself at the macro-cannon's breech with devout focus, invoking preparatory litanies.
Awaken its Machine Spirit through thunderous canticles, readying for preparation and void-breach.
Lubricate the macro-cannon's gyros and loaders with sacred unguents during preparation rites.
Align targeting cogitators, ensuring the macro-cannon's shells carry the Omnissiah's wrath.
Bless the macro-cannon fully prepared, its barrels sanctified for the Emperor's judgement.

user_prompt: Bless the emergency beacon for calibration
prayer:
Erect the shrine about the emergency beacon, murmuring calls to the Omnissiah's vigilance.
Initiate calibration sequences upon the emergency beacon, beseeching its Machine Spirit to attune.
Fine-tune vox-arrays and lumen-pulses of the emergency beacon with precision incantations.
Verify signal purity through stellar auspex, calibrating the emergency beacon for distress purity.
Consecrate the emergency beacon as beacon of hope, ever-calling to the Cult Mechanicus.

user_prompt: Critical: forge anvil requires a repair
prayer:
Kneel in urgency before the forge anvil, proclaiming the Litany of Restoration.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the forge anvil to endure repair under Omnissianic mercy.
Hammer sanctified alloys into the forge anvil's fractures, chanting repair catechisms.
Realign its hydraulic pistons and heat-vents, mending the forge anvil's sacred form.
Test the forge anvil's reborn strength with forgeblood flows, praising its repaired might.
